DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. CLAIMANTS CYNTHIA HERNANDEZ AND MARTIN PANTOJA ARE ORDERED TO PROVIDE ANSWERS PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES AND TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 20 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES FLEMING; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Dec-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.551.4997, for petitioners;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted, no opposition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

MOTION To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca D. Wagner, Esq., Assistant District Attorney, 415.553.4997, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

Petitioner's counsel stipulated to the judge pro tem.

RULING: There being no appearance by respondent, and no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is unopposed and granted in its entirety. Claimants Cynthia Hernandez and Martin Pantoja are ordered to provide answers Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents, Petitioner's First Set of Judicial Council Form Interrogatories and to Petitioner's First Set of Special Interrogatories within 20 days after notice of order.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
